command:
import os
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import arabic_reshaper
from bidi.algorithm import get_display
import math
import random

# Settings
W, H = 1920, 1080
desktop = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop')
out_path = os.path.join(desktop, 'restaurant_banner_v2.png')

# Create image with gradient
img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
for y in range(H):
    r = int(139 * (1 - y/H))
    g = 0
    b = 0
    draw.line([(0, y), (W, y)], fill=(r, g, b))

# Load fonts
try:
    font_main = ImageFont.truetype('C:/Windows/Fonts/tahomabd.ttf', 65)
    font_sub = ImageFont.truetype('C:/Windows/Fonts/tahoma.ttf', 38)
except:
    font_main = ImageFont.truetype('C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf', 65)
    font_sub = ImageFont.truetype('C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf', 38)

# Arabic text processing
main_text = arabic_reshaper.reshape('\u0645\u0631\u062d\u0628\u0627\u064b \u0628\u0643\u0645 \u0641\u064a \u0645\u0637\u0639\u0645 \u0627\u0644\u0631\u0643\u0646 \u0627\u0644\u062c\u0645\u064a\u0644 \u0639\u0646\u062f \u0627\u0628\u0631\u0627\u0647\u064a\u0645')
main_bidi = get_display(main_text)
sub_text = arabic_reshaper.reshape('\u0623\u0637\u0628\u0627\u0642 \u0634\u0647\u064a\u0629 \u0648\u0623\u062c\u0648\u0627\u0621 \u0631\u0627\u0642\u064a\u0629')
sub_bidi = get_display(sub_text)

# Calculate text positions
main_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), main_bidi, font=font_main)
main_w = main_bbox[2] - main_bbox[0]
main_h = main_bbox[3] - main_bbox[1]
main_x = (W - main_w) // 2
main_y = (H // 2) - main_h - 40

sub_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), sub_bidi, font=font_sub)
sub_w = sub_bbox[2] - sub_bbox[0]
sub_h = sub_bbox[3] - sub_bbox[1]
sub_x = (W - sub_w) // 2
sub_y = main_y + main_h + 80

# Draw text shadow
for dx in [-2, -1, 0, 1, 2]:
    for dy in [-2, -1, 0, 1, 2]:
        if dx != 0 or dy != 0:
            draw.text((main_x+dx, main_y+dy), main_bidi, font=font_main, fill=(0, 0, 0))

# Draw main text (golden)
draw.text((main_x, main_y), main_bidi, font=font_main, fill=(255, 215, 0))

# Decorative line
line_y = main_y + main_h + 30
line_len = 400
line_x1 = (W - line_len) // 2
line_x2 = line_x1 + line_len
draw.line([(line_x1, line_y), (line_x2, line_y)], fill=(255, 215, 0), width=3)
draw.ellipse([line_x1-8, line_y-8, line_x1+8, line_y+8], fill=(255, 215, 0))
draw.ellipse([line_x2-8, line_y-8, line_x2+8, line_y+8], fill=(255, 215, 0))
draw.ellipse([(W//2)-6, line_y-6, (W//2)+6, line_y+6], fill=(255, 215, 0))

# Draw subtitle shadow
for dx in [-1, 0, 1]:
    for dy in [-1, 0, 1]:
        if dx != 0 or dy != 0:
            draw.text((sub_x+dx, sub_y+dy), sub_bidi, font=font_sub, fill=(0, 0, 0))

# Draw subtitle
draw.text((sub_x, sub_y), sub_bidi, font=font_sub, fill=(255, 228, 181))

# Double border frame
for offset in [15, 25]:
    draw.rectangle([offset, offset, W-offset-1, H-offset-1], outline=(255, 215, 0), width=2)

# Corner decorations
for cx, cy in [(40, 40), (W-40, 40), (40, H-40), (W-40, H-40)]:
    sz = 12
    draw.polygon([(cx, cy-sz), (cx+sz, cy), (cx, cy+sz), (cx-sz, cy)], fill=(255, 215, 0))

# Decorative elements (away from center text area)
random.seed(42)
text_zone_top = main_y - 60
text_zone_bottom = sub_y + sub_h + 60
for _ in range(20):
    x = random.randint(50, W-50)
    y = random.choice([random.randint(50, max(51, text_zone_top-30)), random.randint(min(text_zone_bottom+30, H-51), H-50)])
    sz = random.randint(3, 7)
    alpha = random.randint(80, 160)
    color = (255, 215, 0)
    if random.random() > 0.5:
        draw.polygon([(x, y-sz), (x+sz, y), (x, y+sz), (x-sz, y)], fill=color)
    else:
        for angle in range(0, 360, 72):
            ex = x + int(sz * math.cos(math.radians(angle)))
            ey = y + int(sz * math.sin(math.radians(angle)))
            draw.line([(x, y), (ex, ey)], fill=color, width=1)

img.save(out_path, quality=95)
print(f'Image saved to: {out_path}')
print(f'Dimensions: {img.size}')
print(f'File size: {os.path.getsize(out_path)} bytes')
description: إنشاء صورة البانر المُحسّنة لمطعم الركن الجميل باستخدام arabic_reshaper و bidi
